summary: Full end-to-end MVP smoke test for Ortoook. Backend (GET /api/, POST/GET /api/contact, POST/GET /api/designs) verified via curl — all 200 with correct schema. UI verified via Playwright: homepage/hero/navbar/catalog render; Personalizar scrolls to customizer; all customizer option groups (modelo, color, suela, personaje, talla) selectable via data-testid; validation and successful submissions both fire toasts. Contact form validation + success submission verified. DB persistence confirmed: contacts and designs collections both grew from 1→3 after curl and UI submissions; latest records show data from UI test ('Mama QA' / 'Lucia', 'QA Bot').
passed: POST /api/contact 200 with correct Contact schema (id, created_at)
GET /api/contact and GET /api/designs return persisted records
Homepage loads with hero 'Pasos felices, pies sanos' and 'Diseña tus tenis' CTA
Catalog renders 3 products (Nube Runner, Aqua Splash, Solar Pop) with 3 Personalizar buttons
Customizer options counts: modelo=3, color=8, suela=5, personaje=8, talla=11; all selectable
Customizer empty submit -> error toast: 'Por favor escribe tu nombre y teléfono para el pedido'
Customizer valid submit -> success toast '¡Diseño enviado! Te contactaremos muy pronto 🎉' and record persisted in DB
Contact empty submit -> error toast: 'Completa nombre, correo y mensaje'
Contact valid submit -> success toast '¡Mensaje enviado! Te responderemos pronto 💌' and record persisted in DB
notes: Nav link visibility check initially failed only due to a strict get_by_role('link') selector; screenshot confirms nav items render correctly. No app-side issue.
